basicInfo.name: Pooki
basicInfo.flavor: Pooki earned special powers by consuming the magic fruit of the Mystic Tree. Can the newly improved Pooki hold up against the goblins?

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Headbutt
Skill 1.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 170% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).
 - 70% chance to inflict Stun. [Duration: 3 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 170% of Physical Attack.

profile.story:
Pookis are a species of mushroom monster native to the Mystic Woods.
The mushrooms that grew near the Mystic Tree were able to receive some of its strength, and some of them were even able to grow arms, legs, and an intellect matching that of a child.
These sentient mushrooms would eventually come to be known as "Pooki."
Pookis have also gained the ability to photosynthesize, so they are not at all aggressive toward other forms of life. However, they are still considered monsters, much to their dismay.
Many Pookis have grown fed up with being the weakest monster around and dream of becoming strong, heroic saviors in their own right.
They train hard to one day be able to hold their own against goblins.

basicInfo.name: Pooki
basicInfo.flavor: Determined not to be picked on by the goblins, Pooki trained hard to become stronger. However, it still seems like he needs more training.

profile.story:
Pookis are a species of mushroom monster native to the Mystic Woods.
The mushrooms that grew near the Mystic Tree were able to receive some of its strength, and some of them were even able to grow arms, legs, and an intellect matching that of a child.
These sentient mushrooms would eventually come to be known as "Pooki."
Pookis have also gained the ability to photosynthesize, so they are not at all aggressive toward other forms of life. However, they are still considered monsters, much to their dismay.
Many Pookis have grown fed up with being the weakest monster around and dream of becoming strong, heroic saviors in their own right.
They train hard to one day be able to hold their own against goblins.

basicInfo.name: Pooki
basicInfo.flavor: Found in the eastern part of Mystic Woods. He says he hates goblins, but he seems to be scared of them.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 80% of Physical Attack 1 time(s).

 - Increases Damage: To 80% of Physical Attack.

profile.story: The Goddess Elena made a special necklace and bestowed it with a fragment of her will in order to save the world in times of crisis. Eons later, this necklace started to develop a will of its own, but its desire to save the world was no less strong.
